compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

D:\\KEVIN\\Proyectos\\UrbanShield\\backe.serviceRawFile:
service: urbanshield-backend

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs18.x
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}
  region: ${opt:region, 'us-east-1'}
  environment:
    NODE_ENV: production
    API_PREFIX: /api
    USE_IN_MEMORY_STORE: "false"
    DYNAMODB_TABLE_USERS: !Ref UsersTable
    DYNAMODB_TABLE_REPORTS: !Ref ReportsTable
    DYNAMODB_TABLE_NOTIFICATIONS: !Ref NotificationsTable
    DYNAMODB_TABLE_ACTIVITY_LOGS: !Ref ActivityLogsTable
    S3_BUCKET_NAME: ${self:custom.s3BucketName}
    USE_COGNITO: "true"
    COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID: ${env:COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID}
    COGNITO_CLIENT_ID: ${env:COGNITO_CLIENT_ID}
    SNS_TOPIC_EMERGENCY_ALERTS: !Ref EmergencyAlertsTopic
    LOCATION_MAP_NAME: ${env:LOCATION_MAP_NAME, 'UrbanShieldMap'}
    LOCATION_PLACE_INDEX: ${env:LOCATION_PLACE_INDEX, 'UrbanShieldPlaceIndex'}

  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        # Permisos para DynamoDB
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
            - dynamodb:DeleteItem
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:Query
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt UsersTable.Arn
            - !Sub ${UsersTable.Arn}/index/GSI_Email
            - !GetAtt ReportsTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt NotificationsTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt ActivityLogsTable.Arn

        # Permisos para S3 (Subida de fotos vía URL presignada)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:PutObject
            - s3:GetObject
            - s3:DeleteObject
          Resource:
            - !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${self:custom.s3BucketName}/*

        # Permisos para SNS (Mensajería)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sns:Publish
          Resource:
            - !Ref EmergencyAlertsTopic

        # Permisos para Amazon Location Service
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - geo:SearchPlaceIndexForText
            - geo:GetMapTile
          Resource: "*"

custom:
  s3BucketName: urbanshield-uploads-${self:provider.stage}-${aws:accountId}

functions:
  api:
    handler: src/lambda.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          method: ANY
          path: /
      - httpApi:
          method: ANY
          path: /{proxy+}

resources:
  Resources:
    # 1. Tabla de Usuarios
    UsersTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: UrbanShield-Users-${self:provider.stage}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: userId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: email
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: userId
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: GSI_Email
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: email
                KeyType: HASH
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

    # 2. Tabla de Reportes
    ReportsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: UrbanShield-Reports-${self:provider.stage}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: reportId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: reportId
            KeyType: HASH

    # 3. Tabla de Notificaciones
    NotificationsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: UrbanShield-Notifications-${self:provider.stage}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: notificationId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: notificationId
            KeyType: HASH

    # 4. Tabla de Auditoría
    ActivityLogsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: UrbanShield-ActivityLogs-${self:provider.stage}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: logId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: logId
            KeyType: HASH

    # 5. Bucket de S3 para subida de fotos
    S3UploadsBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: ${self:custom.s3BucketName}
        CorsConfiguration:
          CorsRules:
            - AllowedHeaders: ['*']
              AllowedMethods: [PUT, GET, HEAD]
              AllowedOrigins: ['*']
              MaxAge: 3600

    # 6. Tema de Amazon SNS para Alertas
    EmergencyAlertsTopic:
      Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
      Properties:
        TopicName: UrbanShield-EmergencyAlerts-${self:provider.stage}

compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
